# Q3 count events by user (failed logon bruteforce)

**Dataset**: `gx_05_auth` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Failed-logon brute-force detection — count failures per source/account. Q3 count events by user.

```sql
dataset = gx_05_auth | comp count() as events by user
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 6). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
